journal.name: Stanford Journal of Law, Business & Finance
aliases: Stanford Journal of Law, Business and Finance

registry_refs.notes: Two duplicate registry routes aggregate to this publication.

publication_scope.notes: Stanford Law hosts many other publications on the same domain.

evidence.notes: The journal archive path is not disallowed, but Crawl-delay is 600 seconds.

Not fetched after robots discovery because the 600-second crawl delay exceeded the bounded onboarding window. The checked-in sitemap proposes article.loop-item.pt-publication and a[href$='.pdf'], but those selectors were not revalidated live.

reconnaissance.notes: Robots-first preflight intentionally stopped before the archive request. All layout and metadata eras remain unsampled.

scope.notes: Scope rules are provisional until the archive can be sampled politely.

entry_points.notes: Registry and checked-in sitemap seed; live response deferred.

nodes.notes: Proposed direct PDF route from the checked-in sitemap.

edges.notes: Provisional local selector, not live evidence.

archive_patterns.notes: Publication-scoped seed from registry and sitemap.

pagination.termination: Unknown until a crawl-delay-compliant archive response can be inspected.
pagination.notes: Do not infer pagination from the provisional sitemap.

layout_eras.label: Current Stanford Law layout, unsampled
layout_eras.notes: No year bounds or historical markup claims can be made from this run.

title.notes: Provisional local sitemap lacks a title selector.

patterns.notes: Provisional checked-in sitemap selector; no response was requested.

robots.notes: Archive path is not disallowed; Crawl-delay is 600 seconds.

barriers.notes: A 600-second crawl delay is incompatible with the requested short onboarding loop; the archive was not fetched.

access.politeness_notes: Schedule future probes with at least 600 seconds between requests to law.stanford.edu and coordinate them with other Stanford work.

verdict.summary: Robots permits the publication path but imposes a 600-second crawl delay, so the bounded run stopped before live archive or PDF validation.
blockers: Crawl-delay: 600 prevents a short interactive onboarding loop
Archive selectors and metadata remain unvalidated
verdict.next_action: Run a scheduled, crawl-delay-compliant three-request probe of the archive, one item page, and one PDF.
verdict.implementation_notes: The host is already mapped to SelectorDrivenAdapter; do not activate the provisional sitemap until title and pagination selectors are live-validated.
